attachments.fallback: How to Merge Multiple PST Files into Single PST File? - @mohdkaif002 (Mohd Kaif)
attachments.text: If you are looking for a method to merge multiple PST files into single PST, you can use the <https://www.sysinfotools.com/recovery/pst-merge.php|SysInfo PST Merge Tool>. This powerful tool effectively combines emails, contacts, calendars, and tasks from multiple Outlook Data files into a single, larger PST file. It’s the ideal solution for consolidating numerous smaller PSTs. Key features include the ability to eliminate duplicate emails, exclude at…
